items.title: Mergesort — divide and conquer
items.caption: log₂(n) levels × O(n) work per level = O(n log n) total; stable and predictable.

items.title: Quicksort — partition around a pivot
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB A["[5, 2, 8, 1, 9, 3, 7, 4]
pivot = 5"] A --> Lt["less: [2, 1, 3, 4]"] A --> Eq["eq: [5]"] A --> Gt["greater: [8, 9, 7]"] Lt --> Lr["recurse → [1, 2, 3, 4]"] Gt --> Gr["recurse → [7, 8, 9]"] Lr --> Joined["concat: [1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 7, 8, 9]"] Eq --> Joined Gr --> Joined
items.caption: Average O(n log n) but a bad pivot (e.g. always smallest) degenerates to O(n²).
